mapper.sql: id, record_id, user_id, asset_type, title, content_json, tags, difficulty, confidence_score, dedupe_key, target_module, target_id, status, sort_order, review_note, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_asset_candidate SET title = #{title}, content_json = #{contentJson}, tags = #{tags}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE learning_asset_candidate SET status = #{status}, target_id = #{targetId}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM learning_asset_candidate WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM learning_asset_candidate WHERE update_time > create_time

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM learning_asset_candidate WHERE status IN
#{item}

SELECT asset_type AS assetType, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS publishedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REVIEWING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount FROM learning_asset_candidate GROUP BY asset_type ORDER BY totalCount DESC, asset_type ASC
